info.description: Site-wide brand colors. Editing and publishing here recolors the live site within ~60 seconds — no code change needed.

brandColor.description: Primary brand color (hex, e.g. #0324FF) — used for buttons, links, nav highlights

accentColor.description: Accent color (hex, e.g. #FFA31A) — used for secondary CTAs and highlights

inkColor.description: Near-black UI color (hex, e.g. #000000) — used for dark buttons, footer, dark text
